buildCommand: pnpm turbo db:generate && echo '=== PRISMA ENGINE SEARCH ===' && find . -name 'libquery_engine*' -type f 2>/dev/null && echo '=== COPYING ENGINE ===' && mkdir -p apps/web/.prisma/client && find . -name 'libquery_engine*' -type f -exec cp {} apps/web/.prisma/client/ \; && find . -name 'schema.prisma' -path '*/.prisma/*' -exec cp {} apps/web/.prisma/client/ \; && ls -la apps/web/.prisma/client/ && pnpm turbo build --filter=@velora/web...
